calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Setting Of Default Prove-Up Hearing Re: Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Robert Cohen, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, VII MP SAN FRANCISCO HOTEL OWNER, LLC, dba, Four Seasons Hotel San Francisco.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) KBR CAPITAL PARTNERS, LLC; KBR CAPITAL PARTNERS, INC.; KBR CAPITAL PARTNERS MANAGEMENT, LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Phng Thong sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $26,828.31
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10%: $2,226.50
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $555.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $29,609.81
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2014 Continued To Apr-30-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
